assets.name: boss_alley_king
assets.prompt: alley boss, tall muscular man with scars, leather jacket open showing chest, arms crossed, dominant aura, gold chain necklace

assets.name: boss_dojo_master
assets.prompt: martial arts dojo master, older man in worn gi, calm but deadly stance, grey streaked hair tied back, powerful forearms

assets.name: boss_underground_champ
assets.prompt: underground fighting champion, heavily muscular, tape-wrapped fists, battle scars everywhere, cold eyes, shirtless with fighting shorts

assets.name: boss_street_legend
assets.prompt: legendary street fighter, tall lean man in long coat, cigarette in mouth, relaxed but menacing stance, experienced veteran aura

assets.name: boss_rival
assets.prompt: rival fighter same age as protagonist, mirror image build, black sleeveless hoodie, competitive fierce expression, fists clenched

assets.name: boss_final
assets.prompt: final boss ultimate street king, massive imposing figure, crossed arms, aura of absolute power, traditional Korean martial arts attire modernized, intimidating calm expression

assets.name: master_fist
assets.prompt: elderly fist martial arts master, wise old Korean man, simple clothes, small but powerful build, mentor figure, kind eyes with hidden strength

assets.name: master_kick
assets.prompt: kick technique master, middle-aged Korean woman in martial arts uniform, one leg raised in stance, stern but fair expression

assets.name: master_dodge
assets.prompt: old hermit dodge master, thin elderly Korean man with long beard, staff in hand, mysterious wanderer look, serene expression
